ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sale */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the sale occurred */,
  "article_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the product code */,
  "sales_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "store_sales_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold at the store level */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product sold */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product sold */,
  "product_supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the product sold */,
  "sale_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_article_code FOREIGN KEY ("article_code") REFERENCES products ("article_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the store is located */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (e.g., retail, wholesale) */,
  "square_footage" TEXT /* Square footage of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the manager */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Hire date of the manager */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "article_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "article_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "article_group" TEXT /* Group of the product (e.g., WINE, LIQUOR) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  "unit_size" TEXT /* Unit size of the product (e.g., 750ML, 1.75L) */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* Image of the product */,
  "product_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "product_dimension" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  "parent_category" INTEGER /* Parent category of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name for the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the supplier */,
  "supplier_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store */,
  "article_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the product code */,
  "current_quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "inventory_value" TEXT /* Total value of the inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level of the inventory */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity of the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_article_code FOREIGN KEY ("article_code") REFERENCES products ("article_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, regional manager, analyst) */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store the user is associated with */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., sales, inventory, product) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, yearly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the report period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the report period */,
  "total_sales" TEXT /* Total sales during the report period */,
  "total_store_sales" TEXT /* Total store sales during the report period */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory report */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, yearly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the report period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the report period */,
  "total_inventory" INTEGER /* Total inventory quantity during the report period */,
  "total_value" TEXT /* Total value of the inventory during the report period */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_reports_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance record */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the performance record */,
  "average_delivery_time" TEXT /* Average delivery time for the supplier */,
  "reliability_score" TEXT /* Reliability score of the supplier (0-100) */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the supplier's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_performance_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance record */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the performance record */,
  "sales_growth" TEXT /* Sales growth rate for the store */,
  "inventory_turnover" TEXT /* Inventory turnover rate for the store */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the store's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_performance_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view_sales, edit_inventory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
